name: Hometown Low-Cost
description: Cheaper housing, more fallback, and a ceiling that arrives sooner than you want.
opportunity_text: Cheap housing and parent fallback make it easier to stabilize early.
pressure_text: If you stay too passive here, it starts to feel like your life never left neutral.

name: Mid-Size City
description: Nothing comes easy for free here, but most paths are viable if you stop bleeding money.
opportunity_text: Steady work, manageable rent, and fewer extremes make this the most forgiving long game.
pressure_text: You can survive here without a plan, but you will not surge ahead by accident.

name: High-Opportunity Metro
description: The biggest ceilings are here, but weak plans get punished faster and more expensively.
opportunity_text: High ceilings, stronger networks, and better career upside reward momentum.
pressure_text: Rent, debt, and pace can shred you if your setup is sloppy.
